provenance.localhostRationale: The active ACFS swarm exposes mcp-agent-mail on the VPS-local loopback address used by Codex agents: http://127.0.0.1:8765. This is canonical for this fixture pack even though it is not a public remote URL.
provenance.notes: The operation-* captures are live JSON-RPC tools/call envelopes captured from the running mcp-agent-mail streamable-http endpoint. They use an isolated synthetic project key under /tmp so the canonical operation shape is real while the active Hoopoe swarm inbox is not polluted.

captures.purpose: Liveness probe; daemon health endpoint mirror.
Readiness probe; daemon health endpoint mirror.
OAuth metadata advertised by the MCP gateway; pinned for the bearer flow contract.
File-reservation lock metadata snapshot — feeds the Hoopoe reservation surface and the activity panel reservation card.

Live JSON-RPC tools/call capture proving project creation/ensure envelope shape.

Live JSON-RPC tools/call capture registering the receiver identity for the synthetic fixture project.
Live JSON-RPC tools/call capture sending a message between the synthetic sender and receiver.
Live JSON-RPC tools/call capture fetching the synthetic receiver inbox after send_message.

Live JSON-RPC tools/call capture releasing the exclusive fixture-path reservation.

captured: mail-api-unified-inbox (read-only inbox feed; equivalent to fetch_inbox at the HTTP layer)
api-projects-agents (registered agents list — read-side of register_agent)
drift.notes: The earlier read-only localhost pack has been extended with live operation captures. The server URL remains 127.0.0.1 because mcp-agent-mail is intentionally bound to loopback on the ACFS execution host; that loopback endpoint is the canonical HTTP surface used by the running Codex agents. No replay-only captures are used in this pack.
